div.font:
- Although all outputs
have been depicted as per state (More), they will moved to state transitions (Mealy) in the implementation
- This may be split into to parallel software FSMs, one per controller, which may improve reliability.- Last year, we ran the
- This loop may be overridden manually for testing
- Backfeed controls have been moved to hardware as of last year
